target_age_group.Description: The target developmental milestone age group for the scan (e.g., P28, P35).

age_days.Description: The true chronological age of the animal on the day of the scan.

weight_g.Description: Body weight of the animal measured prior to the scan.

respiration_bpm.Description: Average respiration rate recorded during the functional scan.

comment.Description: Additional notes or observations recorded during the session.

scan_date.Description: The actual date the scan was carried out on in YYYYMMDD.
